name: Magikey Battle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鍵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>闘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>争</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 Normal Monster, 1 "Magikey" monster, or 1 "Magikey Maftea" in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck, then if you activated this card in response to your opponent's card or effect activation, Normal Monsters and "Magikey" monsters you control (except Tokens) are unaffected by that opponent's card effect.
eff: Target 1 Normal Monster, 1 "Magikey" monster, or 1 "Magikey Maftea" in your GY; shuffle it into the Deck, then if you activated this card in response to your opponent's card or effect activation, Normal Monsters and "Magikey" monsters you control (except Tokens) are unaffected by that opponent's card effect.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
mst: Unaffected by the opponent's card effects
